title: Consolidated Financial Statements of the Nestlé Group 2022
expected_content_elements: Cover and content pages for financial statements
Consolidated income statement, balance sheet, cash flow statement, changes in equity
Notes to the financial statements with cross-references
Auditor’s report (if in the same PDF)
key_details: Shows Nestlé Group’s consolidated financial position as of Dec 31, 2022 and 2021 (CHF figures).
Balance sheet lists current and non-current assets and liabilities plus equity components.
Includes detailed notes explaining accounting policies and line items.
layout_features: Complex, multi-column tables with multiple header rows and subtotals.
Repeated page headers/footers, sometimes with table footnotes at page bottoms.
Long notes with nested bullet lists.
images_and_diagrams_description: Primarily text and tables; limited or no decorative imagery in the financial statements section.
tables_description: High-density financial tables spanning multiple pages, with many numeric columns and associated notes.
extraction_checklist: Are all table headers and subheaders captured correctly (e.g., CURRENT LIABILITIES, NON-CURRENT LIABILITIES)?
Do numeric values align to the correct line item and year?
Are negative values or items in parentheses preserved correctly?
Are note references (superscripts or note numbers) attached to the correct line items?
Is any table row truncated or duplicated due to page breaks?
